description: Join a community or submit a join request. Requires an approved user account.

main.description: Join a community directly (open policy) or submit a join request (approval policy).

did.description: The DID of the community to join.

status.description: Result status: 'joined' if immediately joined, 'pending' if join request submitted.

errors.name: AlreadyMember
errors.description: User is already a member of this community.

errors.name: AlreadyRequested
errors.description: User has already submitted a pending join request.
